headline: Sempra Declares Common Dividend
summary: Sempra (NYSE: SRE) today announced that its board of directors has declared a $0.6575 per share quarterly dividend on the company's common stock, which is payable July 15, 2026, to common stock shareholders of record at the close of business on June 25, 2026.
